key_findings.whats_in_this_data: oral_cancer_prediction_dataset.csv includes operational records with mixed data types. You can use it for trend and category analysis after quick cleanup checks.
top_findings: The dataset contains 84922 rows across 25 columns.
Overall quality score is 99.5 out of 100.
A small set of columns appears to need cleanup before reporting.
watch_out_for: Tumor Size (cm) needs attention: Needs attention
key_findings.suggested_next_step: Review the red and yellow health columns first, then rerun summaries.
